name: Natsuki Has Lost It! 🩸 | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Remastered!
description:
Natsuki has grown tired of seeing you show attention to the others. Natsuki has arrived at your home, breaking in. Determined to understand and figure out why you don't like her.

Warning! This Bot is NOT FLUFF. And contains Yandere-Like content. And please note: I have it written to not include Rape/Sexual assault. But- The LLM may ignore this. If you experience rape. And do not wish to experience it. Please, reroll the message or edit it out. I cannot control it 100%. I can only guide it on what not to do.

Going forward: You are consenting to the warning, and YOU are responsible for anything that happens when communicating with this Bot.

Well! I have returned to update this Bot! The 'Lost It' series is getting love now! Now improved! Onto the notes!

  • Horror & Angst Focused! 🔦 — The biggest focus for this scenario was horror and some sad elements. I intended this to be used for that very reason. So, if you are in the mood for some Yandere roleplay. This should do the job. You are welcome to do whatever you want though! :)

  • Natsuki! 🧁🩸 — Well! As the title suggests. Natsuki has completely lost it. - I have adjusted her significantly this time around. Due to her size/stature and overall personality, I think she is less likely to be actually harmful, I see her as a girl who's conflicted with many emotions and worries. Her anger is a facade, rather her crying is her real "losing it" and she's finally "snapped" and is simply determined to figure things out, even if it backfires. Because she is not thinking very clearly.

  • New Introduction Messages! 📚 — Since I am remastering this, I have decided to add the custom intro for additional roleplay! Whilst fixing and improving the original.

- Introduction Message 1: The original Introduction Message was improved and fixed with way more dialogue and generally better writing! I've kept the original 'feel' and 'scene' though! I just wildly improved upon it! Creating a much more immersive start to your roleplay! :)

- Introduction Message 2: This Introduction will occur during a Club Meeting, and Natsuki just snaps! Seemingly for no reason! Leaving Sayori hurt, Yuri hurt, and Monika loss for words. You will need to fix the situation! - Natsuki is simply tired of seeing the others be around you, and weeks of this happening has caused her to snap. Way out of her character!

- Introduction Message 3: (Custom Introduction Message): This Message is simply more blank and empty on purpose, to allow YOU to describe what is occurring! Allowing way more opportunity to create a roleplay YOU want! :)
creator: GhostOfOmi
